gt_sql: SELECT T1.milliseconds FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.lap = 1 ORDER BY T1.time LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT MIN(milliseconds) AS milliseconds FROM lapTimes WHERE lap = 1
question: In which race did the fastest 1st lap time was recorded? Please indicate the time in milliseconds.
